SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-26-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE VENUE CHALLENGES OF PRINTRONIC CORP. AND LINKSHARE CORP ARE DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT LINJSHARE CORP'S REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS DENIED. DEFENDANT LINKSHARE CORP'S REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO THE MATTERS ARGUED THEREIN BEING RAISED AS DEFENSES AT TRIAL. PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY TELEPHONE UPON TEN BUSINESS DAY ADVANCE NOTICE TO THE CLERK. THE APPEARANCE OF ANY ATTORNEYS SHALL BE IN CONFORMANCE WITH CAL.CODE CIV PROC 116.530. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT SHUTTERFLY ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
